name: Workhuman Employee Recognition API
what_it_does: Workhuman REST API for employee recognition, rewards, and engagement platform. Enables AI agents to trigger recognition awards, manage milestone celebrations (work anniversaries, birthdays), query recognition data and analytics, sync employee data, and integrate recognition programs into HRIS and communication workflows. Workhuman serves enterprise companies with social recognition and continuous performance programs.
use_cases: Triggering employee recognition awards from performance management agents
Automating milestone celebrations from HR workflow agents
Querying recognition analytics from culture and engagement agents
Syncing employee data with recognition programs from HRIS integration agents
not_for: Simple bonus or incentive management without social recognition
Performance review platforms without peer recognition needs
SMB without enterprise recognition program budget
best_when: An enterprise HR team wants AI agents to automate recognition triggers based on performance data, milestone events, and peer nominations, integrating with HRIS and communication tools.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Recognition data reveals which employees are recognized and for what, which is sensitive personnel information. Cross-border data transfer requirements for global programs.

auth.notes: Workhuman uses OAuth 2.0 client credentials for enterprise API access. Enterprise customer credentials via Workhuman implementation team. No self-service API access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise recognition program pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise annual contracts per employee; recognition award budget separate from SaaS fees
pricing.notes: Irish company (Dublin HQ). Enterprise-only recognition platform. Publicly accessible social recognition. API access as part of enterprise implementation.

performance.rate_limits: Enterprise SLA rate limits per client

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Recognition data reveals employee performance signals — sensitive personnel data
No public MCP server — enterprise-only API via implementation team
Limited public documentation — requires Workhuman enterprise relationship
Irish company — GDPR native; EU-first data residency
Award budgets and redemption are separate from recognition API — financial integration required
Social recognition is public within the company — automating recognition requires appropriate framing
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Employee recognition and performance signals. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. Irish company — EU-first. OAuth2. Enterprise-only with limited public docs.

security_score_components.security_notes: Employee recognition and performance data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. Irish company. OAuth2. Enterprise-only.
